info.description: This is a clean and modular boilerplate for Go REST APIs with RBAC, Audit Logs, and WebSockets.
info.title: Go Clean Boilerplate API

get.description: Retrieves a list of all available access rights.

post.description: Creates a new access right (resource group).
Associates an endpoint with a specific access right.
Retrieves a list of access rights based on dynamic filter and sort criteria provided in the request body.
post.summary: Get access rights with dynamic filters

400.description: Invalid request body or filter criteria

post.description: Removes an association between an endpoint and a specific access right.

delete.description: Deletes an access right by ID.

get.description: Returns all active API Keys associated with the current organization.

post.description: Generates a new API Key for the authenticated user and organization. The raw key is returned only once.

delete.description: Permanently revokes and deletes an API Key.

get.description: Exports audit logs to CSV format within a date range.
Initiates an asynchronous export of audit logs to CSV format. Returns immediately.

post.description: Retrieves audit logs with dynamic filtering and pagination.
Sends a password reset email if the account exists.
Authenticates a user and returns access token and user info.
Revokes the current session and clears refresh token cookie.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user's information.

post.description: Refreshes access and refresh tokens using the refresh token cookie.
Creates a new user account and auto-provisions a default workspace.
Resends the email verification link to the authenticated user.
Resets the user's password using a valid reset token.

get.description: Redirects the user to the specific OAuth2 provider (google, microsoft).
Handles the OAuth2 callback, exchanges code for token, and authenticates user.

post.description: Generates a one-time ticket for WebSocket authentication.
Verifies the user's email address using a verification token.

get.description: Returns a branch only when it belongs to active tenant context.

post.description: Registers a new API endpoint in the system.
Retrieves a list of endpoints based on dynamic filter and sort criteria provided in the request body.

400.description: Invalid request body or filter criteria

get.description: Establishes a Server-Sent Events connection for unidirectional real-time notifications.

post.description: Creates a new organization with the current user as owner
Accepts an invitation to join an organization. If user is new (shadow), sets password and activates account.

get.description: Retrieves all organizations the current user is a member of
Retrieves organization details by its slug
Retrieves organization details by its ID
Retrieves all members of an organization

post.description: Invites a user by user ID to join an organization

delete.description: Removes a member from an organization (owner cannot be removed)

patch.description: Updates a member's role or status in an organization

get.description: Retrieves list of members who are currently online via WebSocket
Retrieves all Casbin policies.

post.description: Grants all endpoints of the given access right to the specified role
post.summary: Bulk assign an access right to a role

post.description: Assigns a role to a specified user (Casbin). Defaults to 'global' domain.
Checks multiple permissions for the current user in a single request.
Grants a permission (path + method) to a role (Casbin). Defaults to 'global' domain.
Creates a parent-child relationship between two roles. Defaults to 'global' domain.

delete.description: Removes a parent-child relationship between two roles. Defaults to 'global' domain.

get.description: Retrieves role hierarchy with inherited and effective permissions
Retrieves permissions aggregated by resource with CRUD mapping

delete.description: Revokes a permission (path + method) from a role (Casbin). Defaults to 'global' domain.
Removes all endpoints of the given access right from the specified role
delete.summary: Bulk revoke an access right from a role

delete.description: Revokes a role from a specified user (Casbin). Defaults to 'global' domain.

get.description: Returns all access rights with is_assigned/is_partial flags for the given role
get.summary: Get access rights assignment status for a role

get.description: Retrieves all user IDs assigned to a specific role. Defaults to 'global' domain.
Retrieves all permissions assigned to a specific role.
Retrieves all parent roles for a given role. Defaults to 'global' domain.
Returns a list of all projects belonging to the active organization.

post.description: Creates a new project within the active organization context.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing organization ID

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific project.

delete.description: Soft deletes a project from the active organization.

get.description: Get a list of all available roles.

post.description: Create a new user role.
Retrieves a list of roles based on dynamic filter and sort criteria provided in the request body.

400.description: Invalid request body or filter criteria

delete.description: Deletes a role by ID. Only superadmin should have access.

get.description: Returns daily activity metrics (logins, audit events) for a given period.
Returns system-level performance metrics (latency, error rate, uptime).
Returns high-level system statistics (total users, roles, audit logs, etc.)

post.description: Implements the TUS protocol for resumable file uploads. Supports POST (initiate), PATCH (content), and HEAD (status).

parameters.description: Total size of the file in bytes
parameters.name: Upload-Length

delete.description: Terminates an ongoing TUS upload and removes its partial data.

head.description: Retrieves the current offset and status of a TUS upload.

patch.description: Uploads a chunk of data to an existing TUS upload.

parameters.description: Offset within the file where this chunk starts
parameters.name: Upload-Offset

get.description: Retrieves a list of all users with optional pagination and filtering. Accessible only by admins/superadmins.
Retrieves profile information for the currently authenticated user.

put.description: Updates the name or password for the currently authenticated user.

patch.description: Uploads a new avatar image for the current user.

post.description: Creates a new user account.

409.description: User with the same ID already exists

post.description: Retrieves a list of users based on dynamic filter and sort criteria provided in the request body.

400.description: Invalid request body or filter criteria

get.description: Retrieves profile information for a specific user by their ID. Accessible only by admins/superadmins.

delete.description: Deletes a specific user by their ID. Accessible only by admins/superadmins.

patch.description: Updates the status of a specific user. Accessible only by admins/superadmins.

get.description: Returns a list of all webhooks registered for the given organization.

post.description: Registers a new webhook URL to receive specified events.

get.description: Returns the details of a specific webhook.

put.description: Updates the configuration of an existing webhook.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing organization_id

get.description: Returns a paginated list of delivery logs for a specific webhook.
Establishes a WebSocket connection for real-time updates and presence. Requires a one-time ticket obtained from `/auth/ticket`.

BearerAuth.description: "Type 'Bearer ' followed by a space and the access token."
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
